research_question: What algorithms simulate magnets via software, and are there prototype projects with open-source code?
assumptions: Technical audience with basic engineering knowledge
Focus on open-source projects with publicly available code
Practical relevance: tools that can be downloaded and run
Three-scale approach: nanoscale (micromagnetic), macroscopic (FEM), system scale (analytical)
